milestones.label: Original iPhone
milestones.meaning: Multi-touch turns the phone into a software canvas.
milestones.visual: black glass slab, keynote light, single touch ripple

milestones.label: App Store
milestones.meaning: The phone becomes an ecosystem for software distribution.
milestones.visual: empty screen becomes an icon grid

milestones.label: Retina Display
milestones.meaning: Pixels disappear into a sharper interface surface.
milestones.visual: pixel grid tightens into smooth glass

milestones.label: Touch ID
milestones.meaning: Identity moves into the device interaction layer.
milestones.visual: fingerprint ring becomes a security portal

milestones.label: iPhone X
milestones.meaning: The home button exits and the screen becomes the object.

milestones.label: USB-C
milestones.meaning: The phone becomes a more universal creative connector.
milestones.visual: single cable line connects glass device to studio gear

milestones.label: Apple Intelligence
milestones.meaning: The device starts to act as a personal AI surface.
milestones.visual: soft neural halo appears behind the device
